items.title: What work should stay human when AI handles routine tasks?
items.businessQuestion: When AI can handle routine office tasks, what work should a person still do themselves?
items.connection: This connects to the Course Introduction because BUS123 focuses on using technology thoughtfully. Students can see that business tools change workflows, but people still need judgment, communication, and accountability.
items.discussionPrompt: Pick one workplace task, such as meeting notes, scheduling, email drafts, customer follow-up, or spreadsheet cleanup. Would you automate it with AI, keep it human, or use a mix of both? Explain one benefit and one risk.
